name: fraudshield-ai
description: FraudShield AI - run all services locally with a single command

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ML,NEST,REACT" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:ml" "npm run dev:nest" "npm run dev:react"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd gateway-nestjs && npm install && cd ../frontend-react && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
